title: The Land of the Spring Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A hidden land of seasons needs the Dragon Masters' help! 🌸

q.en: What destroyed the crops in the Kingdom of Bracken?
q.zh: 是什么摧毁了布拉克恩王国的庄稼？

options.en: A flood from the river according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 河流引发的洪水（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: An earthquake caused by Maldred and the Naga
options.zh: 马尔德雷德与地震龙纳迦引发的地震

options.en: A long, cold winter
A fire in the fields

explain.en: Maldred controlled the earthquake dragon Naga, and the attack shattered Bracken's crops and land.
explain.zh: 马尔德雷德控制了地震龙纳迦，这次袭击摧毁了布拉克恩的庄稼和土地。

q.en: What is the name of the Spring Dragon in this book?
q.zh: 这本书里春龙的名字是什么？

options.en: Fallyn
Worm
Hinky Pink
Naga

explain.en: Fallyn is the green Spring Dragon who is connected to nature and can make plants grow.
explain.zh: 法琳是一条绿色的春龙，她与自然相连，能让植物生长。

options.en: The king's royal wizard
A redcap fairy who loves marching
options.zh: 一个喜欢行军的红帽小妖精

options.en: The ruler of Inis Banba
Fallyn's Dragon Master

explain.en: Breen is the red-haired, freckled Dragon Master of Fallyn, who lives in Inis Banba.
explain.zh: 布琳是法琳的驯龙师，红头发、有雀斑，住在伊尼斯·班巴。

q.en: Why must Drake leave his dragon Worm behind in the fairy world?
q.zh: 为什么德雷克必须把自己的龙沃姆留在精灵世界之外？

options.en: There is only room for one dragon in the fairy world
options.zh: 精灵世界里只能容纳一条龙

options.en: Worm was too scared to go
Worm was too big to fit through the door according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 沃姆太大，进不了门（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Breen did not like Worm

explain.en: Breen explains that Drake must find Fallyn using his own courage and wits, and only one dragon may enter.
explain.zh: 布琳说德雷克必须靠自己的勇气和智慧去寻找法琳，而且精灵世界里只能有一条龙进入。

q.en: What color is the sky in the hidden fairy world?
q.zh: 隐藏的精灵世界里天空是什么颜色的？

options.en: Purple
Blue
Pink
Green

explain.en: Inside the fairy world the sky is a strange shade of pink instead of bright blue.
explain.zh: 精灵世界里的天空是一种奇特的粉色，而不是明亮的蓝色。

q.en: How does Drake escape the redcaps who force him to march forever?
q.zh: 德雷克是如何从逼他永远行军的红帽小妖精手里逃脱的？

options.en: He fights them with his sword
He tricks them into hide-and-seek and has them count to ten thousand six hundred twenty-three
options.zh: 他骗它们玩捉迷藏，让它们数到一万零六百二十三

options.en: He asks Breen to carry him away according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他请布琳把他带走（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: He runs away faster than them

explain.en: Drake promises a 'more fun' game, gets them to release their magic hold, then tells them to count to 10,623 while he escapes.
explain.zh: 德雷克说有个更好玩的游戏，让它们解开魔法控制，然后让它们数到10623，趁机溜走。

q.en: How does Drake get rid of Hinky Pink's thick fog?
q.zh: 德雷克是如何驱散辛奇·平克制造的浓雾的？

options.en: He waits for night to fall
He uses a lantern he found
He asks Worm to make his Dragon Stone glow brightly
options.zh: 他让沃姆把自己的龙石变得明亮发光

options.en: He blows it away with his breath according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他用自己的呼吸把它吹散（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Drake contacts Worm through his Dragon Stone, and Worm makes the stone shine so brightly that the fog vanishes.
explain.zh: 德雷克通过龙石联系沃姆，沃姆让龙石发出耀眼的光，浓雾随即消散。

q.en: How does Drake realize the 'Bo' he meets in the fairy world is not real?
q.zh: 德雷克是怎么发现精灵世界里遇到的“博”不是真人的？

options.en: Breen told him the truth
The boy had the wrong name
Bo was wearing different clothes according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 博穿了不一样的衣服（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Drake tests him by mentioning Darma and the Gold Dragon, but Rori went, not Bo
options.zh: 德雷克用达尔玛和黄金龙的事试探，其实是罗瑞去的，不是博

explain.en: The fake 'Bo' agrees they went to Maldred's workshop with Darma and the Gold Dragon, but Drake knows Rori went, not Bo — exposing the pooka.
explain.zh: 假“博”承认和达尔玛、黄金龙去过马尔德里德的工坊，但德雷克知道去的是罗瑞，于是识破了这只变形精灵（pooka）。

q.en: In the wood sprites' riddle, the right flower matches the pink sky and a cherry-red center. How many petals did it have?
q.zh: 在树精灵的谜语里，符合“粉色天空色、樱桃红中心”的花有多少片花瓣？

options.en: Five
Six
Nine according to some versions of the story
Four

explain.en: It had to be more than a horse's four legs and fewer than a spider's eight legs; Drake found a five-petal pink flower.
explain.zh: 谜语说花瓣要多于马的4条腿、少于蜘蛛的8条腿，德雷克找到了一朵5片花瓣的粉色花。

q.en: After Fallyn restores Bracken's farms, what special new flower appears?
q.zh: 法琳让布拉克恩的农田恢复生机后，出现了什么特别的新花？

options.en: A sunflower
The Dragon Flower, shaped like a dragon's head
A redcap blossom according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 红帽小妖精的花（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A plain rose

explain.en: The yellow-and-red flowers look like dragon heads with fire, so the Dragon Masters name them Dragon Flowers.
explain.zh: 那些黄红相间的花看起来像喷火的龙头，于是驯龙师们把它们命名为“龙花”。
